project.name: AtyaLibraries Ecosystem Modernization
project.planning_repository_bootstrap_note: Create AtyaLibraries/Atya.Roadmap before issue import. This approved pre-import bootstrap is external to the ATYA dependency graph and does not change task readiness.

phases.name: Authoritative inventory and evidence
phases.gate: The repository/package manifest is schema-valid; contested findings have evidence; release lineage and all audit scopes are recorded without destructive action.

phases.name: Source-of-truth policy and architecture decisions
phases.gate: All blocking ADRs are accepted, published, and linked; no dependent implementation starts with an unresolved ownership or compatibility question.

phases.name: Security, compatibility, and release blockers
phases.gate: Active disclosure and release-integrity risks are closed with regression tests and documented recovery paths.

phases.name: Build, workflow, and release consolidation
phases.gate: Reusable automation is fixture-tested, immutable, fleet-realized, and continuously audited from one policy source.

phases.name: Foundation and cross-cutting contracts
phases.gate: Canonical Result, time, serialization, validation, HTTP, and compatibility contracts are implemented with migration artifacts and API baselines.

phases.name: Messaging, data, web, and diagnostics hardening
phases.gate: Runtime protocols have explicit semantics, bounded behavior, conformance/scenario coverage, and production-safe defaults.

phases.name: Migration, documentation, templates, and adoption
phases.gate: Golden compositions pass the readiness gate; documentation is executable; templates are extracted only from proven compositions.

phases.name: Issue, PR, branch, and repository cleanup
phases.gate: Audited work is migrated or completed, old artifacts link to replacements, and only verified branch/issue cleanup has occurred.

phases.name: Final fleet validation and closure
phases.gate: Every managed repository is clean, documented, policy-conformant, CI-green, and release-ready, with evidence captured in Atya.Roadmap.

execution_semantics.hard_dependencies: Block execution and alone determine Ready or Blocked status and cycle calculation.
execution_semantics.advisory_prerequisites: Recommended inputs that may be bypassed only with a documented caveat accepted in the issue; never affect Ready/Blocked status or hard dependency cycles.
execution_semantics.phase_completion_gates: Non-blocking reporting milestones; they are not implicit dependencies on later-phase tasks.
